annotations.summary: APP API error rate above 5% for 5m
annotations.description: 5xx rate on app-api has been above 5% for the last 5 minutes. Latest sample: 8.3%. Correlates with a deploy 12 minutes ago (rev a1b2c3d).

annotations.summary: SPIRE agent SVID expiring in under 24h on 3 nodes
annotations.description: 3 nodes in the eks-prod-us-east-1 cluster have SPIRE agent SVIDs expiring in under 24 hours. Rotation job last succeeded 6 days ago.
P99 latency for rate-limit-service has been 310-340ms for 15 minutes, above the 300ms SLO threshold. No recent deploys. CPU and memory are within normal range.
cert-manager failed to renew internal-dashboard-tls once. Certificate is still valid for 18 more days. Will retry automatically.
